name: Sourdough English Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine starter, milk and 2 cups flour.
2. Mix well and cover. Let sit at room temperature for 8 hours.
3. Mix together 1/2 cup of the flour, sugar, salt and baking soda in a small bowl.
4. Sprinkle this mixture over the dough and mix to form a very stiff dough. Add the remaining 1/4 cup flour and knead for 3 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough to be about 3/4 inch thick, then cut with a 3-inch round cutter or cup.
6. Place each muffin on an oiled cookie sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart. Sprinkle lightly with cornmeal.
7. Cover and let rise for one hour.
8. Bake in a lightly oiled, covered electric skillet at 200°C (300°F) for 8 minutes on each side.
